subjects.description: A stickman character with a distressed expression, wearing casual clothes.
subjects.action: Holding empty pockets, with abstract dollar signs flying away from them like smoke.

image_prompt.environment: A dimly lit, slightly messy room, symbolizing financial chaos.
image_prompt.composition: Medium shot, focused on the character and their disappearing money.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: ¿Gastas sin control y tu dinero se esfuma? ¡Detén ese sangrado financiero YA!

subjects.description: A stickman character looking confused and stressed, surrounded by bills.
subjects.action: Shrugging, overwhelmed by a pile of bills.

image_prompt.environment: A desk cluttered with invoices and receipts.
image_prompt.composition: Close-up on the character's face and the overwhelming bills.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: El error más común es dejar que el tiempo pase sin hacer que tu dinero trabaje para ti.

subjects.description: A stickman character with a defeated posture.
subjects.action: Sitting on a single, deflated balloon labeled 'Savings'.

image_prompt.environment: A barren, empty landscape, symbolizing stagnation.
image_prompt.composition: Wide shot to emphasize isolation and lack of growth.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Piensas que no tienes suficiente, pero subestimas el poder de empezar poco a poco.

subjects.description: A stickman character looking sadly at an empty piggy bank.
subjects.action: Shaking an empty piggy bank upside down.

image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: La inacción es tu peor enemigo cuando se trata de tus finanzas.

subjects.description: A stickman character with a curious expression, looking at a sprouting seedling.
subjects.action: Gently touching a small green sprout.

image_prompt.environment: A patch of fertile soil, with a single drop of water about to fall on the sprout.
image_prompt.lighting: Soft, natural light, hinting at new beginnings.
image_prompt.composition: Close-up on the sprout and the character's hand.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Pero existe una magia: el interés compuesto. Tu dinero empieza a generar más dinero.

subjects.description: A stickman character holding a magnifying glass over a small coin.
subjects.action: Examining a single coin with intense focus.

image_prompt.environment: A minimalist setting, with the focus solely on the coin and the character.
image_prompt.lighting: A spotlight on the coin and magnifying glass, symbolizing discovery.
image_prompt.composition: Extreme close-up, highlighting the detail on the coin.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Imagina que cada dólar que inviertes es una semilla.

subjects.description: A graphic showing two lines: one flat and one with a steep upward curve. A stickman character is walking along the curved line.
subjects.action: Walking confidently on an upward-trending graph line.

image_prompt.environment: An abstract space with glowing lines representing financial growth.
image_prompt.lighting: Bright and optimistic, with glowing accents.
image_prompt.composition: Side view, showing the character's progression.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Esa semilla, con el tiempo, ¡germina y da frutos! Y esos frutos, ¡generan más semillas!

subjects.description: A visual comparison: on the left, a small pile of coins. On the right, a much larger pile of coins with some bills on top.
subjects.action: Visually contrasting small initial investment with significant growth.

image_prompt.environment: Clean, split background, clearly demarcating the two sides of the comparison.
image_prompt.lighting: Bright and clear, highlighting the difference.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Es la magia del interés sobre interés. Tu dinero trabajando sin que tú muevas un dedo.

subjects.description: A stickman character looking at a simple calculator, with numbers appearing on its screen.
subjects.action: Pressing a button on the calculator, showing numbers increasing rapidly.

image_prompt.environment: A clean, minimalist desk with a calculator.
image_prompt.lighting: Focus on the calculator's screen and the character's hands.
image_prompt.composition: Close-up on the calculator and the character's interaction.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: No necesitas ser un experto, solo ser constante.

subjects.description: A stickman character holding a small bag of seeds, about to plant them.
subjects.action: Kneeling down and placing a few seeds into the ground.

image_prompt.lighting: Warm, golden hour light, symbolizing potential.
image_prompt.composition: Medium shot, showing the character and the action of planting.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Invierte una pequeña cantidad hoy, y observa cómo crece exponencialmente.

subjects.description: A stickman character standing proudly next to a flourishing tree laden with coins and bills.
subjects.action: Smiling, arms outstretched, beside a thriving money tree.

image_prompt.environment: A vibrant, lush garden, bathed in sunlight.
image_prompt.composition: Wide shot, showcasing the character and their impressive financial harvest.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: ¡Este es el poder del interés compuesto acelerado!

subjects.action: Signing a contract with a confident flourish.

image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Tu dinero trabaja para ti, creando oportunidades y libertad.

subjects.description: A graphic showing a small starting point transforming into a large, expanding circle of wealth.

image_prompt.environment: An abstract, energetic space with radiating lines from the growing circle.

scenes.narration: Cada pequeña inversión de hoy es un futuro lleno de posibilidades.

image_prompt.environment: A bright, sunny horizon with a path leading forward.

scenes.narration: ¡Empieza hoy! Tu futuro financiero te espera.
